end return(function(U,r,R,H,L,P,o,u,E,C,g,s,a,K,Z,Q,Y,M,I,m,G)s,E,C,u,I,Z,m,K,Y,a,G,Q,g,M=function(U,V)local r=a(V)local R=function(R,H)return m(U,{R,H},V,r)end return R
